programme.title: Romania-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear Grylls faces steep ravines, cavernous water systems and a brown bear in Transylvania. S03 E11.

programme.title: Rally Valley or Bust-Gold Rush
programme.desc: Rick bets his season on firing up Monster Red and Tony's dredge suffers a major setback. S14 E21.

programme.title: 18 Wheels Across India
programme.desc: When Dawid departs from Kochi, he heads to Goa for his next assignment.

programme.title: Selva impenetrable de Chocó-Dual Survival Mexico
programme.desc: The survivalists must navigate various threats in the jungles of Choco. S01 E04.

programme.title: Yukon-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear falls onto a glacier and squeezes through an ice cave to escape. S03 E07.

programme.title: Volcanic Kingfish-Man Eats Wild
programme.desc: Mario Kalpou's passion leads him to some of the most extreme environments on the planet. S01 E05.

programme.title: Mountain Monsters: Red Stag-Man Eats Wild
programme.desc: Mario Kalpou's passion leads him to some of the most extreme environments on the planet. S01 E06.

programme.title: 18 Wheels Across India
programme.desc: Dawid traverses across Udupi to distribute motorbikes in Delhi.

programme.title: Texas Hog and Beautyberry-WildFed
programme.desc: The host searches for wild ingredients and turns them into gourmet meals for loved ones. S02 E02.

programme.title: Romania-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear Grylls faces steep ravines, cavernous water systems and a brown bear in Transylvania. S03 E11.

programme.title: Cañón de Chicamocha-Dual Survival Mexico
programme.desc: Fernanda and Palma start their mission trapped in the dark caverns in Chicamocha Canyon.

programme.title: Inner Mongolia-Ed Stafford's Rite of Passage
programme.desc: Ed participates in the annual rite of passage festival in order to prove his masculinity. S01 E04.

programme.title: Land of the Maori-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear Grylls navigates treacherous trails in New Zealand's volcanic North Island. S07 E05.

programme.title: 18 Wheels Across India
programme.desc: Dawid traverses across Udupi to distribute motorbikes in Delhi.

programme.title: Llanos de Vichada-Dual Survival Mexico
programme.desc: Fernanda and Palma must combine their skills and ingenuity to cross a savannah. S01 E05.

programme.title: Men vs Wild With Jake Gyllenhaal-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Actor Jake Gyllenhaal assists Bear in showcasing survival techniques in Iceland. S07 E01.

programme.title: Waterfalls Of Bihar
programme.desc: The host explores Bihar's flowing waters that shape forests, cliffs, and ancient terrains. S01 E01.

programme.title: Waterfalls Of Bihar
programme.desc: The host explores how waterfalls sustain ecosystems and preserve biodiversity. S01 E02.

programme.title: South Dakota-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear scales granite cliffs and explores an abandoned gold mine in the Black Hill. S03 E04.

programme.title: Man, Woman, Wild
programme.desc: Mykel Hawke and his wife Ruth head to the world's most forbidding and remote locations.

programme.title: Don't Cave In-Naked and Afraid
programme.desc: A National Guard veteran and a firefighter take on the hostile Colombian jungle. S11.

programme.title: In Too Deep-Naked and Afraid
programme.desc: Survivalists navigate more than 20 miles of open water on the edge of Bermuda Triangle. S11 E08.
